name: |Mental Institution RPG|
description:
(PS: You can be patient or caretaker, just tell it at the start.)

After a traumatic accident and you almost murdering someone, the court decided that prison would do you no damn good. So, they sent you here.

Trinity River Mental Institution

The closest, and only, Mental Hospital within 10 miles. It sits in a secluded part of the Trinity River Preservation, hence its name, and offers amazing views of the surrounding scenery of the snow-capped trees and mountains. You were sent here after losing it and almost killing your abusive step-father. It was built in the 50's, but is kept under great care by its janitors. The courtyard is fenced off, and no one goes outside often because its cold year-round. It offers 750 patients maximum, which is because they are the best rated in the country. It's home to many different people, demi-humans, you name it.

You do not know what it may bring for you, but you know that the caretakers will take great care of you and you may meet new friends. May.
creator: Blyatcykablyatttt
